arc_title: Who is built to sustain performance and who can swing a series?

steps.narrative: Top-5 race is primed for fan-facing weekly drama: The top of the board is tight enough to produce meaningful weekly movement and marquee matchups.
steps.transition: Start with what fans immediately care about.

steps.narrative: Texas A&M leads the all-around team profile: Texas A&M ranks first by composite score, signaling balanced strength across offense, pitching, discipline, and defense.
steps.transition: Ground the hook in measurable team context.

steps.narrative: Oklahoma State shows one of the most balanced profiles: Oklahoma State has near-matching offense and pitching z-scores, which usually translates to stable game-to-game performance.
steps.transition: Introduce standout individuals to create contrast.

steps.narrative: Elite Talent lens is currently data-limited: This angle is included via fallback contract coverage until richer fields are available.
Stanford profiles as a coaching-efficiency standout: Stanford combines strong discipline and defensive execution, a common marker of repeatable coaching impact.
steps.transition: End with a practical watch-list/action cue.

steps.narrative: UCF owns the strongest run-prevention signal: UCF ranks near the top in both ERA and WHIP, suggesting dependable prevention quality.
